title: abutilon sessiliflorum
intro: Abutilon sessiliflorum, also known as the country mallow or wild mallow, is a perennial plant belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Abutilon sessiliflorum include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
